steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: The blank comes between the verb “is” and the phrase “the chromophore” that completes it. These two parts must stay connected without any punctuation between them.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content: Choice D places “called” with no punctuation, allowing the verb to directly connect to “the chromophore.” Choices A, B, and C insert punctuation (dash, semicolon, or period) that breaks this direct connection. That matches choice D — D is correct.
